about.title: About HostFlow AI Technologies
about.subtitle: All-in-One AI-Powered Business Management Platform
about.founderMsgP1: HostFlow AI Technologies was built with one clear vision: to empower businesses across multiple industries to scale faster through powerful, practical Advanced AI and without the need for massive teams, expensive software stacks, or technical complexity.
about.founderMsgP2: Today, most businesses are slowed down by disconnected tools that waste time, money, and momentum. I decided to build something different for my valuable users.
about.founderMsgP3: HostFlow AI Technologies brings together dedicated industry workspaces, Advanced AI Assistance, AI-driven CRM systems, Automation, and Multilingual support and all within a single, unified platform. Our Advanced AI CRM seamlessly integrates with your company's workflow to manage daily operations, organize leads, and automate repetitive tasks with precision.
about.founderMsgFeaturesIntro: To ensure your business stays ahead of the curve, we have integrated cutting-edge features:
about.founderFeat1Desc: Powered by ElevenLabs for a natural, interactive experience.
about.founderFeat3Desc: Instant customer support and data-driven strategies to boost sales and revenue.
about.founderFeat4Desc: Proactive tools to help you retain your valuable customers.
about.founderFeat5Desc: Manages schedules and reminders so no opportunity is missed.
about.founderFeat6Desc: Real-time price adjustments based on season, demand, and market conditions.
about.founderFeat7Desc: Full support for 15 real languages so your team and customers communicate naturally.
about.founderMsgP4: This is only the beginning. We are evolving every week, listening to our users, and building for the long term. If you are an early adopter — thank you. You are the foundation of this ambitious journey.
about.founderMsgP5: Your feedback is our greatest asset. We are committed to evolving HostFlow AI Technologies based on your real-world needs, implementing user suggestions rapidly to ensure this platform remains built by you and for you.
about.founderMsgClosing: You are not just joining a platform — you are stepping into the next generation of intelligent business. HostFlow AI Technologies is building the future where automation, growth, and global scale become the new standard. The future belongs to those who move first.
about.mission: Our mission is to help businesses automate their operations and grow faster using AI. We aim to remove complexity from business management by providing smart tools.
about.missionFooter: So businesses can focus less on manual work and more on growth, customers, and profitability.
about.vision: Our vision is to build a future where businesses across 8 powerful industries run on fully independent, AI-powered systems.
about.visionDesc: HostFlow AI is designed to support multiple industries including Tourism & Hospitality, Airlines, Car rental, Healthcare, Education, Logistics, Events & Entertainment, and Railways — where each industry operates in its own dedicated and independent system, not mixed or shared.
about.visionSeparation: That's why HostFlow AI ensures complete separation between industries — delivering clarity, focus, and zero confusion.
about.visionGoal: Our goal is to create a platform where:
about.visionGoalBullet2: Decisions are driven by real-time insights
about.visionFooter: HostFlow AI is not just a tool — it's a new generation AI operating system, built to run multiple industries independently, efficiently, and intelligently.
about.story: From AI-powered email writing and lead scoring to revenue forecasting and customer behavior analysis, HostFlow AI eliminates manual work and helps businesses make faster, smarter decisions.
about.why1Desc: Every feature is powered by AI — from demand forecasting to dynamic pricing to conflict resolution.
about.why2Desc: Whether you're managing hotels, airlines, healthcare, logistics, or any service-based business — HostFlow AI adapts to your industry.
about.why3Desc: Our AI prevents double-bookings before they happen, saving you time and reputation.
about.why4Desc: Customers report an average 34% revenue increase within the first month of using our platform.
about.teamDesc: Whether you're managing hotels, airlines, healthcare, logistics, or any service-based business — HostFlow AI adapts to your industry and runs your operations intelligently.

conflictPolicy.title: Conflict Policy
conflictPolicy.description: When two scheduling sources conflict, the higher-tier source always wins. This order is enforced server-side and cannot be bypassed.
conflictPolicy.noConflicts: No conflicts resolved yet — the system is clean.

resolutionHub.title: AI Resolution Hub
resolutionHub.subtitle: Live issue tracking — your AI advisors resolve problems before they cost you revenue.
resolutionHub.noActive: No active issues. Your AI advisors are on standby.
resolutionHub.resolveDesc: A confirmation email will be sent automatically.
